texto: Grief is beautiful?' She thought it was the most dreadful feeling possible. At best she viewed the world through a haze, and at worst everything looked black.'It means you've loved another with all your heart,' Luka said. 'What's the use of being alive if you've never loved like that, not even once?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Belinda Alexandra: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Grief is beautiful?' She thought it was the most dreadful feeling possible. At best she viewed th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, grief, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e reflexao.

frase_original: Grief is beautiful?' She thought it was the most dreadful feeling possible. At best she viewed the world through a haze, and at worst everything looked black.'It means you've loved another with all your heart,' Luka said. 'What's the use of being alive if you've never loved like that, not even once?
